title: I.M.F. Says Iran War Will Drag Global Growth Lower
summary_full: Kristalina Georgieva, the head of the International Monetary Fund, said the war in the Middle East could lead to another bout of inflation and higher interest rates.
summary_public: Kristalina Georgieva, the head of the International Monetary Fund, said the war in the Middle East could lead to another bout of inflation and higher interest rates.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: I.M.F. Says Iran War Will Drag Global Growth Lower
